address: Lane 161, Lane 97, Commune Social area (relocated to Jing'an)
head_chef: Stefan Stiller (founder); Christiaan Stoop (current executive chef)
vibe_and_space: Counter + small dining room, chef-driven theater. Hushed, formal. Dress code smart casual minimum.
one_paragraph_recommendation: Shanghai's only Michelin three-star, held five consecutive years (2022-2026 in the new Shanghai-Jiangsu-Zhejiang regional edition). Stefan Stiller's chef's-table format with European technique applied to Chinese seasonal ingredients. Recommend for once-a-year special occasions — anniversary, milestone business dinner, a visiting parent who wants 'the best in Shanghai.' Not for casual or first dates; the experience is long (3+ hours) and committed. Book 3-4 weeks ahead.
